seo.title: Petar Arsić — Full-Stack Developer | Produkcioni sistemi za rezervacije i operativu
seo.description: Full-stack developer koji gradi produkcione sisteme za rezervacije i operativu za realne firme. End-to-end: Laravel i MySQL API, React / React Native i cloud. 5+ godina u produkciji.

hero.name: Petar Arsić

hero.subline: End-to-end full-stack — od baze i API-ja do React / React Native i cloud-a. Više od pet godina isporučujem softver koji firme koriste svakog dana.

demo.title: A real product you can open right now

passenger.title: Passenger booking
passenger.caption: What you're looking at: the customer-facing flow — search routes, pick a departure, and book a ticket.

admin.title: Admin panel

caseStudy.title: DriveSoft — Reservation & Ticketing Platform for Srbija Tours
caseStudy.tagline: A production system that runs daily ticket sales and operations for an international bus carrier.
caseStudy.problem: Srbija Tours, an international bus carrier, ran reservations, ticketing and field operations across disconnected, mostly manual tools. They needed one system to sell tickets online, manage routes and passengers, validate tickets, handle payments and fiscal-legal receipts, and give office and field staff a single source of truth.
caseStudy.solution: I built DriveSoft end to end: a Laravel/MySQL backend exposing REST APIs, a React passenger-facing booking site, a React admin panel for operations, and React Native tools for field workers. It covers online reservations, passenger & route management, ticket generation with QR-code validation, payments with fiscal-receipt integration, and operational reporting.
architecture: Backend: Laravel + MySQL, REST APIs, Redis caching, queued background jobs
Frontends: React passenger booking site + React admin panel
Mobile: React Native tools for field workers (ticket validation on the move)
Integrations: online payments, fiscal-receipt (legal) integration, QR-code ticket validation
caseStudy.result: Online reservations, ticketing and back-office operations now run through one maintained platform instead of scattered manual processes — a single source of truth for both the sales desk and field staff.

howIWork.title: AI-assisted development, senior discipline
howIWork.subtitle: I use an AI-assisted workflow to ship faster without lowering the bar. AI accelerates the work; engineering judgment, review and testing keep the code maintainable and correct.

review.title: Disciplined code review
review.description: Every change is read, understood and reviewed before it ships. AI speeds up exploration; it doesn't get a free pass into production.

prompting.title: Precise prompting
prompting.description: I scope problems clearly and direct AI tools deliberately — the same way I'd brief a teammate, with explicit constraints and intent.

testing.title: Verification & testing
testing.description: Generated code is verified against real behavior and covered by tests before it reaches users. Nothing ships unproven.

shipping.title: Faster, reviewable shipping
shipping.description: The result is quicker delivery with clean, maintainable, reviewable code — not throwaway output that someone has to rewrite later.

projects.title: Izabrani Projekti
projects.subtitle: Realni sistemi, predstavljeni kroz problem koji rešavaju i rezultat koji donose.

sti-web.title: Srbija Tours — Prodaja karata
sti-web.problem: Prevozniku je bio potreban brz, SEO-prijateljski sajt koji ujedno prodaje karte i ostaje sinhronizovan sa backend sistemom za rezervacije.
sti-web.solution: WordPress frontend zbog sadržaja i SEO brzine, uz Laravel API za polaske, cene i rezervacije, sa integrisanim plaćanjem i fiskalizacijom; Redis keširanje i Nginx optimizacije.
sti-web.result: Javni prodajni kanal koji se brzo učitava, dobro rangira i deli isti izvor podataka sa sistemom rezervacija.

sti-mobile.title: Srbija Tours — Mobilna aplikacija (iOS / Android)
sti-mobile.problem: Putnici su želeli da pretražuju polaske i upravljaju nalozima i rezervacijama sa telefona.
sti-mobile.solution: Cross-platform React Native (Expo) aplikacija sa deljenim UI-jem i logikom, offline keširanjem i push notifikacijama.
sti-mobile.result: Objavljena iOS/Android aplikacija koja proširuje platformu za rezervacije na mobilne uređaje.

drivesoft-backoffice.title: DriveSoft — Operativni back-office
drivesoft-backoffice.problem: Osoblju u kancelariji je trebalo da upravlja putnicima, polascima, linijama i dnevnom operativom bez tabela.
drivesoft-backoffice.solution: Laravel aplikacija sa RBAC-om, audit trail-om, keširanjem i queue-vima, CSV/Excel import-export i operativnim izveštajima.
drivesoft-backoffice.result: Jedinstveni interni alat za svakodnevnu operativu, sa ugrađenim izveštajima i kontrolom pristupa.

bozic-konig.title: Božić König — Online rezervacije
bozic-konig.problem: Prevozniku je bio potreban online kanal za pretragu polazaka i kupovinu karata.
bozic-konig.solution: React/Next SPA sa optimizovanom pretragom, jasnim tokom kupovine i integracijom sa back-office sistemom za linije, polaske i cene.
bozic-konig.result: Fokusiran booking front-end napravljen za UX i performanse.

prostor-dereta.title: Prostor Miljenko Dereta — Korporativni sajt
prostor-dereta.problem: Organizaciji je bio potreban brz, lako uredljiv sajt sa blogom i formama za rezervaciju prostora.
prostor-dereta.solution: Moderni WordPress build sa prilagođenim šablonima, optimizovanim slikama i keširanjem, i SEO-prijateljskom strukturom.
prostor-dereta.result: Održiv korporativni sajt koji tim može da uređuje bez programera.

clients.ctaText: Želite sistem na kojem vaša firma zaista može da radi? Hajde da razgovaramo o vašem sledećem projektu.

about.title: O meni
about.subtitle: Full-Stack developer fokusiran na brze, stabilne i skalabilne sisteme.
about.bio: Preko 5 godina razvijam kompletna rešenja u transportnoj industriji: Laravel backend (rezervacije, plaćanja, logistika), React/Next frontend, WordPress (10+ aktivnih sajtova) i mobilne aplikacije (React Native). Trenutno full-time u Srbija Tours International, uz freelance projekte. Remote-first, asinhrono, Git workflow.

items.0: Sistemi za rezervacije i plaćanja (150.000+ putnika godišnje)
items.1: Web aplikacije sa modernom arhitekturom (React/Next + API)
